queries.question: For each sales position, list the goals they have.
queries.sql: select sales_positions.position_name , goals.goal_type from Sales_Positions_Goals join Goals on Sales_Positions_Goals.goal_id = Goals.id join Sales_Positions on Sales_Positions_Goals.sales_position_id = Sales_Positions.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?position_name ?goal_type WHERE {
  ?sales_positions_goals a :Sales_Positions_Goals .
  ?goals a :Goals .
  ?sales_positions_goals p:hasGoals ?goals .
  ?sales_positions a :Sales_Positions .
  ?sales_positions_goals p:hasSales_Positions ?sales_positions .
  ?sales_positions p:position_name ?position_name .
  ?goals p:goal_type ?goal_type .
}

queries.question: What are the goals all sales positions have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Goals.goal_type  from Sales_Positions_Goals join Goals on Sales_Positions_Goals.goal_id = Goals.id join Sales_Positions on Sales_Positions_Goals.sales_position_id = Sales_Positions.id   GROUP BY Sales_Positions_Goals.goal_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Positions_Goals.sales_position_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sales_Positions)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the goals every sales position has.
